improvements.title: Fix hardcoded container paths in findGitRoot tests
HNSW entry point missing from search candidates
HNSW persistent entry point + dimension validation
CacheManager cleanup timer keeps Node.js alive
agentdb-adapter.ts store() doesn't normalize entry.namespace
improvements.description: namespace was normalised for indexes but not updated in the stored entry object. Entries with empty namespace were findable by ID but invisible to namespace queries. Fixed by spreading { ...entry, namespace } when namespace needs normalisation, matching rvf-backend.ts pattern.

nextTargets: agentdb-adapter.ts: bulkInsert doesn't normalize namespace either (same bug class)
migration.ts: edge cases in legacy format parsing
